sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n34844" key="e)nantio/qetos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐναντῐό-θετος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, Astrol., <sense id="n34844.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in opposition,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cat.Cod.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(4).148</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
